text: Switching to LED bulbs saves energy. A 2021 DOE field study of 12,300 homes showed a 23% average drop in lighting electricity use.
Switching to LED bulbs saves energy. My electricity bill went down after I switched.
Switching to LED bulbs saves energy. The lighting industry generally supports the energy claims.
This algorithm reduces hospital readmissions. A 2024 study used the algorithm in 4 hospitals; readmissions dropped, but there was no control group.
This algorithm reduces hospital readmissions. A stepped-wedge RCT across 11 hospitals (N = 21,400 patients) found a 19% relative reduction at 30 days, p = 0.003.
This algorithm reduces hospital readmissions. Several health systems have adopted it with reportedly positive results.
Microplastics are harmful to human health. A 2023 trial of 80 participants found microplastic levels associated with inflammatory markers, controlling for diet.
Microplastics are harmful to human health. The chemicals just sound bad and they are everywhere.
Microplastics are harmful to human health. A 2024 Nature meta-analysis of 47 cohort studies found a relative risk of 1.34 for cardiovascular events with 95% CI 1.18-1.51.
Building more housing lowers rents. A 2022 NBER study of 1,170 new buildings in 11 cities found a 5-7% rent decline within a half-mile radius after 3 years.
Building more housing lowers rents. The mayor said so in her last speech.
Building more housing lowers rents. Urban economists tend to agree, and the basic supply-demand story is intuitive.
